Motel_management/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 17.
Motel_management/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 8 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 syntax and APIs required by the migration.

Motel_management/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Replace explicit source/target configuration with the release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
Motel_management/pom.xml.why_exists: The release flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures API compatibility with the target JDK, replacing the deprecated separate source/target settings.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Fil.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path creation.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.general_idea: Replace legacy String.format call with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for modern syntax.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner code and elimination of explicit casts.
